intentSynonyms: show me my comments in confluence
see all my comments in confluence
list comments on a page in confluence
description: List footer comments on a Confluence page with optional pagination

page_id.description: Page ID to list comments for

limit.description: Maximum number of comments to return (default 25, max 250)

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response

body_format.description: Body format to return: "storage" (HTML, default) or "atlas_doc_format" (ADF)
